title: The C Major Scale
description: The foundation of Western harmony. Learn the specific pattern of whole and half steps that builds a Major scale.

sessions.title: The Magic Formula
sessions.description: Learn the W-W-H-W-W-W-H pattern of a major scale.

sessions.title: Scale Degrees
sessions.description: Learn how the notes of a scale are numbered 1 through 8.

proficiencies.title: Mastery of The C Major Scale

levels.criteria: Knows the formula W-W-H-W-W-W-H and can construct C Major.
